scripts.codegen: envio codegen && cd generated && npm install && npx rescript build
scripts.hasura:start: docker start envio-hasura 2>/dev/null || docker run -d --name envio-hasura --network host -e HASURA_GRAPHQL_SERVER_PORT=8090 -e HASURA_GRAPHQL_DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:testing@localhost:5433/envio-dev -e HASURA_GRAPHQL_ENABLE_CONSOLE=true -e HASURA_GRAPHQL_DEV_MODE=true hasura/graphql-engine:v2.43.0
scripts.start:server: pnpm hasura:start && pnpm hasura:track & ENVIO_PG_PORT=5433 ENVIO_HASURA=false HASURA_GRAPHQL_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:8090/v1/metadata envio dev
scripts.status: PGPASSWORD=testing psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d envio-dev -c "SELECT id as chain, progress_block, source_block, events_processed, ready_at FROM envio_chains ORDER BY id;"
scripts.stop:server: envio stop && docker stop envio-hasura && docker rm envio-hasura
